parameters.content:
## Google Ads historical export -> fact_channel_daily

T-2 edge case: 'Google Ads developer token not yet approved -> stub the source as historical, wire the API later.'

AFTER IMPORT:
1. Open 'Drive: Watch Drop Folder' and select your Google Drive OAuth2 credential.
2. Ask Aryamaan to name the export file with 'google_ads' in it, e.g. google_ads_historical.csv (only matching names are processed).

Behaviour:
- Handles Google Ads CSV quirks: title/date-range preamble lines before the header, 'Total: ...' footer rows, '--' placeholder values, comma or tab delimiter.
- Export should be CSV (UTF-8), daily breakdown, columns: Day, Campaign, Campaign ID (add it via column picker), Cost, Impressions, Clicks, Conversions.
- campaign_key = 'GADS_' + Campaign ID (falls back to a slug of the campaign name if the ID column was not included).
- Conversions are mapped to leads. TODO: confirm with Margot whether Ads conversions = leads for the dashboard.
- Region parsed from campaign name; otherwise UNASSIGNED for triage.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO dim_campaign (campaign_key, channel_id, campaign_name, source_system, valid_from, is_current)
VALUES ($1, (SELECT channel_id FROM dim_channel WHERE channel_name = $2), $3, $4, CURRENT_DATE, true)
ON CONFLICT (campaign_key) WHERE is_current DO UPDATE SET
  campaign_name = EXCLUDED.campaign_name,
  channel_id = EXCLUDED.channel_id;

parameters.jsCode:
// Re-load the validated fact rows after the dim upsert.
return $('Parse + Validate Ads CSV').all();

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_channel_daily
  (campaign_key, region_id, channel_id, pillar_id, activity_date, source,
   spend, impressions, clicks, leads)
VALUES (
  $1,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $2),
  (SELECT channel_id FROM dim_channel WHERE channel_name = $3),
  NULL,
  $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_grain DO UPDATE SET
  spend = EXCLUDED.spend,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  leads = EXCLUDED.leads,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('google_ads', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, $3, $4);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $("Parse + Validate Ads CSV").first().json._meta.rows_in }},{{ $("Fact Rows").all().length }},{{ $("Parse + Validate Ads CSV").first().json._meta.issues }},{{ $("Parse + Validate Ads CSV").first().json._meta.issue_pct }}
